seo.description: Full Sowkiyama Kannae songs lyrics, Sangamam Songs Lyrics. sharable lyrics snippets, Lyrics: Vairamuthu, Music: AR Rahman, Singer(s): Nithyashree.
seo.keywords: Vairamuthu, Sangamam, AR Rahman, Nithyashree, Sowkiyama Kannae full lyrics, Sangamam songs lyrics, Sowkiyama Kannae lyrics snippets, Sowkiyama Kannae WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Sowkiyama Kannae lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Sowkiyama Kannae'?

The song expresses deep feelings of love and affection, capturing the essence of romantic longing.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie 'Sangamam'?

In Sangamam, the song reflects the emotional connection between the lead characters, enhancing the romantic narrative of the film.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung by Nithyashree and composed by AR Rahman.

When was 'Sowkiyama Kannae' released?

The song was released on July 16, 1999.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Sowkiyama Kannae, the romantic essence of love is beautifully captured through Nithyashree's soulful rendition. The song plays a pivotal role in Sangamam, enhancing the emotional depth of the characters' relationship. With AR Rahman's enchanting music and Vairamuthu's evocative lyrics, it evokes feelings of nostalgia and longing. This melody is perfect for moments of reflection and romance.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Sowkiyama Kannae from Sangamam is a mesmerizing melody that captures the essence of love and longing. With Nithyashree's enchanting vocals and AR Rahman's magical composition, this song transports listeners to a world of romance. Experience the lyrical beauty penned by Vairamuthu that resonates deeply with the heart.
